title: mentha × villosa var. microdonta
intro: Mentha × villosa var. microdonta, also known as wild mint, is a variety of mint plant that is characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive properties, which can help to relieve symptoms of digestive issues, nausea, and headaches. The health benefits of Mentha × villosa var. microdonta include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as congestion and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and take advantage of its health benefits.
